categories.name: All Cruises & Tours
categories.description: Browse all available river cruises, sightseeing tours, dinner cruises, family trips, and private charters.

categories.name: Sightseeing Cruises
categories.description: Daytime river sightseeing cruises with live commentary or audio guides, ideal for first-time visitors.

categories.name: Dinner Cruises
categories.description: Evening and dinner cruises featuring onboard dining, often with live music and panoramic city views.

categories.name: Sunset & Evening Cruises
categories.description: Relaxed sunset and evening cruises, with options for welcome drinks and light snacks.

categories.name: Family-Friendly Cruises
categories.description: Family-oriented cruises with flexible seating, child pricing, and options that include lunch.

categories.name: Private Charters
categories.description: Customizable private boat charters for groups, including evening events and special occasions.

departure_locations.name: Old Town Pier
departure_locations.description: Historic pier located at the edge of Old Town, primary departure point for classic sightseeing and sunset cruises.

departure_locations.name: City Harbor Marina
departure_locations.description: Modern marina close to downtown hotels, used for most dinner cruises and private evening charters.

departure_locations.name: Riverfront Dock East
departure_locations.description: Convenient dock on the east riverfront, popular for family-friendly lunch cruises.

departure_locations.name: Marina Bay Pier
departure_locations.description: Scenic pier near Marina Bay Park, departure point for longer scenic and nature-focused tours.

gift_card_templates.name: Any Cruise Gift Card
gift_card_templates.description: Flexible gift card valid toward any cruise or tour, with a customizable amount.

gift_card_templates.name: Dinner Cruise Gift Card
gift_card_templates.description: Give the gift of an evening on the water, ideal for two guests on a standard dinner cruise.

gift_card_templates.name: Sightseeing Cruise Voucher
gift_card_templates.description: Prepaid voucher for daytime sightseeing cruises, perfect for visitors and tourists.

gift_card_templates.name: Private Charter Credit
gift_card_templates.description: Higher-value gift card intended as credit toward private charters and group events.

cruise_tours.name: Sunset City Lights Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 90-minute shared sunset cruise from Old Town Pier with a welcome drink and skyline views.
cruise_tours.long_description: Drift past the city’s famous riverfront landmarks as the sun sets and the skyline lights up. This relaxed 90-minute cruise departs from Old Town Pier and includes a welcome drink, open-air and indoor seating, and an audio guide with stories about the river’s history.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure; full charge applies within 24 hours.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Check in at the Old Town Pier ticket booth at least 20 minutes before departure.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Light jacket, camera, and comfortable shoes.

cruise_tours.name: Twilight Skyline Cocktail Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 2-hour evening cocktail cruise from City Harbor Marina with live DJ and city lights.
cruise_tours.long_description: Set sail from City Harbor Marina for a stylish 2-hour twilight cruise. Enjoy two included house cocktails, lounge-style seating, and a live DJ soundtrack as you glide past illuminated bridges and riverside landmarks.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure; 50% charge within 48 hours.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Boarding at Gate C, City Harbor Marina. Look for the "Twilight Cruises" flag.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Photo ID for bar service and a light jacket.

cruise_tours.name: Evening River Highlights Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 75-minute shared evening cruise focusing on illuminated landmarks (no drinks included).
cruise_tours.long_description: See the city’s riverside highlights after dark on this affordable 75-minute cruise. Learn about key landmarks from your onboard host as you enjoy unobstructed views from the upper deck. Food and drinks are available for purchase from the onboard bar.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Changes and cancellations allowed up to 12 hours before departure with a 25% fee.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Old Town Pier, Berth 2. Staff in blue jackets will assist you with boarding.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Warm layers for cooler evening temperatures.

cruise_tours.name: Historic City Highlights Sightseeing Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 60-minute daytime sightseeing cruise with live commentary and audio guide options.
cruise_tours.long_description: Discover the city’s essential riverside sights on this 60-minute cruise departing from Old Town Pier. Enjoy live commentary in English plus a multilingual audio guide, indoor and outdoor seating, and great photo opportunities of the historic waterfront.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure. No refunds within 24 hours.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Boarding from Old Town Pier, main gangway. Please arrive 15 minutes before your selected departure.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Comfortable shoes, weather-appropriate clothing, and a camera.

cruise_tours.name: Bridges & Waterfront Sightseeing Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 75-minute late-morning sightseeing cruise under the city’s iconic bridges.
cruise_tours.long_description: Sail beneath the city’s most iconic bridges and along revitalized waterfront districts on this 75-minute cruise. Enjoy a multilingual audio guide and panoramic views from the open upper deck as you learn about engineering feats and local stories.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 24 hours prior. Within 24 hours, tickets are non-refundable.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Old Town Pier, Berth 1. Look for the "Bridges Cruise" signage.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Sunscreen, sunglasses, and a light jacket on cooler days.

cruise_tours.name: Afternoon Panorama River Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 75-minute afternoon sightseeing cruise with skyline and waterfront views.
cruise_tours.long_description: Perfect for a relaxed afternoon on the water, this 75-minute cruise showcases the city skyline, riverside parks, and historic warehouses. A multilingual audio guide is available via complimentary headsets.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Cancel for a full refund up to 24 hours in advance.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Old Town Pier, Berth 3. Boarding starts 10 minutes before departure.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Comfortable clothes, camera, and sun protection.

cruise_tours.name: Family-Friendly Lunch Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 2-hour mid-day family cruise with buffet lunch and kid-friendly commentary.
cruise_tours.long_description: Enjoy a relaxed 2-hour cruise designed for families, featuring a hot-and-cold buffet lunch, reserved indoor seating, and child-friendly commentary about the river’s wildlife and history. Special children’s pricing and high chairs are available.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before sailing; within 24 hours a 50% fee applies.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Riverfront Dock East, next to the playground entrance. Look for the "Family Lunch Cruise" check-in sign.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Comfortable clothes for indoor and outdoor decks; optional stroller for young children.

cruise_tours.name: Weekend Family Brunch Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 90-minute late-morning family cruise with brunch platter and soft drinks.
cruise_tours.long_description: Start your weekend on the water with a relaxed 90-minute brunch cruise. Enjoy a family-style brunch platter, juice and soft drinks, and informal commentary tailored for younger guests.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Fully refundable up to 24 hours in advance.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Riverfront Dock East main entrance. Look for the brunch cruise banner.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Comfortable clothing, and any necessary items for young children.

cruise_tours.name: Gourmet Dinner & Jazz Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 3-hour evening dinner cruise with 3-course menu, live jazz band, and city lights.
cruise_tours.long_description: Experience the river at night with a refined 3-course dinner, table service, and a live jazz trio. This 3-hour cruise departs from City Harbor Marina and includes panoramic windows, an outdoor viewing deck, and a curated wine list (extra cost).
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure; 50% fee within 48 hours.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: City Harbor Marina, Pier 4. Check in at the dinner cruise desk inside the terminal.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Smart-casual attire recommended; bring a light jacket for the outer decks.

cruise_tours.name: Classic Dinner Cruise with Piano
cruise_tours.short_description: 2.5-hour dinner cruise with seasonal menu and live piano music.
cruise_tours.long_description: Enjoy a seasonal 3-course dinner and live piano music as you glide past the city skyline. This 2.5-hour cruise offers a relaxed, romantic atmosphere with both window and standard seating options.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Cancel up to 24 hours in advance for a full refund.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: City Harbor Marina central hall. Follow the signs for "Classic Dinner Cruise".
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Smart-casual clothing and a light jacket for deck viewing.

cruise_tours.name: Luxury Signature Dinner Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: Premium 3-hour gourmet dinner cruise with tasting menu and live quartet.
cruise_tours.long_description: A premium dining experience on the water featuring a chef’s tasting menu, paired wines, and live string quartet. Large panoramic windows and an exclusive top-deck lounge make this 3-hour cruise perfect for special occasions.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Changes up to 72 hours before departure with no fee; non-refundable within 72 hours.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: City Harbor Marina VIP entrance. Check-in desks are clearly signposted.

cruise_tours.name: Private Evening Charter – Classic Cruiser
cruise_tours.short_description: 3-hour private evening charter for up to 12 guests from City Harbor Marina.
cruise_tours.long_description: Charter a classic river cruiser exclusively for your group. This 3-hour evening charter includes a dedicated crew, basic sound system, and welcome soft drinks. Catering and live music upgrades are available on request.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 7 days before departure; 50% fee within 7 days, non-refundable within 72 hours.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: City Harbor Marina, Private Charters desk. Your captain will greet you at the gate.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Comfortable smart-casual clothing; you may bring your own playlist on a phone or USB.

cruise_tours.name: Private Sunset Celebration Charter
cruise_tours.short_description: 3.5-hour private sunset charter for up to 20 guests with optional catering and music.
cruise_tours.long_description: Celebrate birthdays, reunions, or corporate events on a private boat at sunset. This 3.5-hour charter includes a welcome drink for each guest, flexible seating, and optional catering and live music packages.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: 25% deposit non-refundable; remaining balance refundable up to 7 days before departure.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: City Harbor Marina private charter dock. Details confirmed in your charter confirmation email.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Any decorations within policy guidelines and a playlist if not booking a live band.

cruise_tours.name: Private Luxury Yacht Evening Charter
cruise_tours.short_description: 4-hour luxury yacht charter for up to 16 guests with premium bar and canapés.
cruise_tours.long_description: Host an unforgettable evening aboard a modern luxury yacht. This 4-hour charter includes crew, premium open bar, and chef-prepared canapés. Ideal for executive events or intimate celebrations.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Non-refundable deposit; balance refundable up to 10 days before departure.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Luxury dock at City Harbor Marina. Details provided upon confirmation.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Smart attire; flat shoes recommended for safety on deck.

cruise_tours.name: Old Town Architecture Express Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 50-minute express cruise focusing on Old Town’s historic architecture.
cruise_tours.long_description: This compact cruise is perfect if you’re short on time. Sail along the Old Town riverfront while learning about the city’s most important historic buildings and bridges via an audio guide.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Cancel up to 24 hours before your cruise for a full refund.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Old Town Pier information kiosk. Show your voucher at the counter.

cruise_tours.name: Nature & Birdwatching Day Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 3-hour nature-focused cruise from Marina Bay Pier with onboard guide.
cruise_tours.long_description: Leave the city behind on this 3-hour cruise along quieter stretches of the river. An onboard nature guide helps you spot local birdlife and other wildlife, with complimentary binoculars available.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: Marina Bay Pier main gate. Look for the green "Nature Cruise" banner.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Warm layers, binoculars if you have them, and a camera with a zoom lens.

cruise_tours.name: Harbor Lights Short Evening Cruise
cruise_tours.short_description: 60-minute evening cruise around City Harbor’s illuminated waterfront.
cruise_tours.long_description: A budget-friendly way to experience the harbor at night. This 60-minute cruise circles City Harbor, offering close-up views of lit-up piers, ships, and waterfront architecture.
cruise_tours.cancellation_policy_summary: Date changes allowed up to 6 hours before departure subject to availability.
cruise_tours.meeting_point_description: City Harbor Marina, Pier 2. Boarding starts 15 minutes prior to departure.
cruise_tours.what_to_bring: Warm clothing for the open deck and a camera.

promo_codes.description: 10% off summer river cruises and tours on qualifying bookings.
15% off selected dinner cruises for evening departures.
Save $5 on family-friendly cruises with child tickets in the booking.
